collection.name_exists: A collection with that name already exists.
collection.empty: No collections yet. Press + to create one.
classification.manage_hint: Organize your books with categories and subcategories. Deleting a classification keeps other assignments on your books.
classification.name_exists: A classification with that name already exists at this level.
classification.select_parent: Select a category to add the subcategory under.
classification.delete_confirm:
Delete classification "{name}"?
Subcategories will move up one level and books will not be deleted.
classification.delete_failed: Could not delete the classification (there may be a name conflict).
book_dialog.tags_hint: Manage reading status and custom tags here.
settings.title: Settings
settings.language_hint: Changes apply immediately to the main window. Reopen dialogs to update them.
settings.help_hint: Optional tips that highlight controls when you visit a section for the first time. You can replay the tour anytime.
settings.help_tips_enabled: Show guided tips for new sections
settings.theme_hint: Pick a preset palette or customize every color. Save your own styles and switch between them anytime.
theme.title: Color customization
theme.hint: Select a style, adjust each element's color, and save variations to switch between them easily. Changes apply instantly.
theme.name_required: Enter a name for the style.
privacy.title: Privacy mode
privacy.hint: Hide sensitive books and filter content by tags or genres. Protect changes with a local PIN.
privacy.pin_required: Set a PIN of at least 4 characters to enable privacy mode.
privacy.pin_mismatch: PIN and confirmation do not match.
privacy.unlock_hint: Enter your PIN to temporarily show all content.
privacy.verify_hint: Enter your PIN to change privacy settings.
privacy.unlock_tooltip: Unlock to show all books (requires PIN)

license.subtitle:

license.error.incomplete: The license is incomplete or corrupted.
license.error.decode: The license could not be decoded.
license.error.authentic: The license is not authentic or has been tampered with.
license.error.bad_expiry: Invalid expiration date in the license.
license.error.wrong_machine:

pdf.open_failed: Could not open the file. It may be damaged or protected.
pdf.notes_need_id: Notes require a valid book ID.
pdf.bookmarks_need_id: Bookmarks require a valid book ID.
pdf.bookmark_failed: Could not create bookmark (already exists on this page?).
pdf.panel_tooltip: Annotations panel: bookmarks, notes, and highlights (A)
pdf.search_error: The search could not be completed. Please try again.
pdf.reading_mode_tooltip: Distraction-free reading mode (R). Esc to exit
pdf.reading_mode_hint: Reading mode — R or Esc to exit · Ctrl+mouse wheel: zoom
pdf.eye_comfort_tooltip: Filters to reduce eye strain while reading
pdf.eye_comfort.title: Eye comfort
pdf.eye_comfort.hint: Softens contrast and blue light so you can read with less fatigue. The filter is optional and you can adjust the intensity.
stats.title: Reading statistics
stats.subtitle: Overview of your library and reading habits
stats.excludes_private: Statistics exclude books hidden by privacy filters.
export.author: Author
ocr.banner: This PDF appears scanned. Enable OCR to search and select text.
ocr.tesseract_missing: OCR unavailable: install Tesseract-OCR on your system.
ocr.search_needs_ocr: Enable OCR first to search this scanned document.
sync.title: Encrypted sync
sync.hint: Sync reading progress and annotations across devices using a shared folder (OneDrive, Dropbox, etc.). Data is encrypted with your passphrase.
sync.done:
Sync completed.
Books: {books} · Notes: {notas} · Bookmarks: {marcadores} · Highlights: {resaltados} · Progress: {progreso}
trial.expired_message: Your 14-day free trial has ended. Activate a license to keep using LiBooks.
trial.status_expired: Trial ended. Activate a license to continue.
license.subtitle_trial: Free trial · {days} days left. Enter your key when you purchase.
license.subtitle_expired: Your trial has ended. Enter a valid license key.
onboarding.title: Welcome to LiBooks
onboarding.step1_body: Drag files into the library, use Add book, or import a whole folder. LiBooks keeps your PDFs safely on your computer.
onboarding.step2_body: Add author, genre, collections, and tags. Sort and filter as your library grows.
onboarding.step3_body: Open any book, resume where you left off, add bookmarks, highlights, and notes. Everything stays local.
tour.nav.books_body: Your full library lives here. Open any book to continue reading.
tour.nav.stats_body: Track progress, completed books, and recent reading activity.
tour.nav.collections_body: Create themed groups (e.g. fiction, coursework) and filter by collection.
tour.nav.settings_body: Change language, back up your library, set up encrypted sync and guided tips, or replay the tour from here.
tour.library.search_body: Find books quickly by title, author, or genre.
tour.library.sort_body: Order books by title, author, date added, last read, or progress.
tour.library.filter_body: Show only unread, in-progress, completed, or other statuses.
tour.library.tag_body: Narrow the list to books tagged with a specific label.
tour.library.view_body: Switch between grid (covers) and list (details) layouts.
tour.stats.overview_body: See totals, progress breakdown, pages read, and recently opened books.
tour.collections.create_body: Click + to create a collection and assign books to it.
tour.collections.list_body: Click a collection to filter the library. Use edit/delete on hover.
tour.pdf.panel_body: Toggle the side panel to browse bookmarks, notes, and highlights. Shortcut: A.
tour.pdf.annotations_body: Switch tabs to manage page bookmarks, free-form notes, and text highlights.
tour.pdf.reading_body: Hide toolbars for distraction-free reading. Press R or Esc to exit.
tour.pdf.fullscreen_body: Expand the viewer to use the full display. Press F11 to toggle.
tour.pdf.pages_body: See your current page. Use ← →, Page Up, Page Down, Space, Home, or End to move.
tour.pdf.search_body: Search with Ctrl+F. Enter or F2: next match. F1: previous.
tour.pdf.ocr_body: If the PDF is a scanned image, a banner appears to enable OCR. OCR lets you search, select, and copy text. You can also save a searchable copy of the document.
tour.pdf.highlight_body: Turn on highlight mode with H, then select text on a page to mark important passages.
tour.book.title_body: Edit the title shown in your library. It is filled automatically from the PDF when possible.
tour.book.author_body: Set the author so you can search and filter this book later.
tour.book.tags_body: Set reading status and custom tags. Pick from the list or type a new tag and press Add.
tour.book.save_body: Confirm to import or update the book in your library.
tour.book.replace_body: Swap the PDF linked to this book without losing notes, bookmarks, or progress.
tour.book.delete_body: Remove this book from the library. You can choose whether to delete the PDF file too.
tour.collection.name_body: Give your collection a clear name, e.g. "Sci-fi" or "Course readings".
tour.collection.search_body: Filter the list below to find books quickly when building the collection.
tour.collection.books_body: Check the books to include. Selected titles appear as tags above the list.
tour.collection.filters_body: Narrow the book list by author or genre before selecting titles.
tour.collection.save_body: Create or update the collection with the selected books.
library.import_folder_tooltip: Import every PDF from a folder at once
library.continue_reading_tooltip: Quick access to the book you were reading last
book_dialog.author_tooltip: Author name for sorting and search
book_dialog.tags_tooltip: Reading status and custom labels for filtering
book_dialog.tag_picker_tooltip: Pick a status or tag, or type a new one
book_dialog.add_tag_tooltip: Add the selected tag to this book
book_dialog.replace_file_tooltip: Choose a different PDF file for this book
book_dialog.delete_tooltip: Remove this book from the library
collection.title_tooltip: Name shown in the sidebar collections list
collection.search_tooltip: Filter books while selecting members for this collection
collection.books_list_tooltip: Select multiple books to include in the collection
collection.filter_author_tooltip: Show only books by this author
collection.filter_genre_tooltip: Show only books in this genre
collection.save_tooltip: Save the collection with selected books
pdf.search_tooltip: Find text (Ctrl+F). Enter or F2: next · F1: previous
pdf.zoom_tooltip: Zoom with Ctrl+mouse wheel or Ctrl+/Ctrl-
pdf.highlights_tooltip: View all text highlights in this book
pdf.new_note_tooltip: Create a new note for this book (Ctrl+N)
pdf.panel_title_tooltip: Side panel with bookmarks, notes and highlights
backup.title: Backup
backup.hint: Export your full library (database + PDFs) to a .zip file. Use it to back up or move your library to another computer.
backup.imported:
Import completed.
{books} book(s) in manifest, {pdfs} PDF(s) restored.
Restart the app if you merged the database.
backup.import_replace:
Replace the entire current library?

Yes = replace the database.
No = only add books and PDFs that are missing.
update.title: Updates
book_dialog.sensitive_tooltip: When privacy mode is active, this book's cover and/or title can be hidden.
book_dialog.rating_hint: Rate this book from 1 to 5 stars.
tour.book.rating_body: Rate this book from 1 to 5 stars.
tour.library.add_body: Import a single PDF into your library.
tour.library.import_folder_body: Import every PDF from a folder at once. Great for adding many books quickly.
tour.library.rating_body: Show only books that match a star rating you choose.
tour.library.stars_body: Tap the stars on any book card to rate it without opening the edit dialog.
tour.book.genre_body: Optional: set the genre to organize and filter your library later.
tour.settings.backup_body: Export or import your full library (books and PDFs) as a ZIP file. Use this to back up or move your collection between computers.
tour.settings.sync_overview_body: Sync reading progress and annotations (notes, bookmarks, highlights) across devices using a shared folder such as OneDrive or Dropbox. Data is encrypted with your passphrase.
tour.settings.sync_enable_body: Check this box to turn sync on. You will need a shared folder and the same passphrase on every device.
tour.settings.sync_folder_body: Pick a folder inside your cloud storage (OneDrive, Dropbox, Google Drive, etc.). LiBooks stores an encrypted file there with your progress and annotations.
tour.settings.sync_passphrase_body: Choose a strong passphrase (at least 8 characters). Without it, your data cannot be decrypted on another device.
tour.settings.sync_actions_body: Click Sync now to merge changes with the cloud. You can also export or import an encrypted backup manually.
